description_long: This is a military aircraft with a distinctive flying wing design, featuring a broad, triangular planform and no conventional fuselage or tail. The surface is painted in a camouflage pattern with visible German Luftwaffe insignia on both wings, and a yellow marking near the rear. The wings are sharply swept back, giving the airplane a sleek, futuristic appearance. The landing gear is visible and consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all of which appear to be retractable. The cockpit is centrally located at the front of the wing, with a small, enclosed canopy. The overall construction suggests a metal airframe, likely with some glass or acrylic for the cockpit canopy.
description: A camouflaged, flying wing military airplane with swept-back wings, Luftwaffe insignia, and a central cockpit. The design is sleek and lacks a conventional tail, with visible retractable landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the triangular flying wing shape, camouflage paint, and insignia on both wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, central cockpit canopy, and landing gear beneath the wing.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down angle, again showing the swept-back wings and insignia, with landing gear visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the trailing edge of the wings, the yellow rear marking, and the landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, flying wing configuration with sharply swept, delta-shaped wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines embedded within the wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: Tailless configuration with no conventional vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit integrated into the center of the wing with a small canopy.
